search_query: activities to avoid after pacemaker surgery
combined_text: How should I restrict my activities after a pacemaker procedure? Ravi K. Sureddi, MD on behalf of Riverside Community Hospital Clinical Cardiac Electrophysiology Patients need to observe a few restrictions for six to eight weeks after getting a pacemaker or an ICD (defibrillator).
